title: SEIF Approval (Operator Gate)
description: Human-sovereignty gate. A protected action cannot reach AUTHORIZED without an APPROVED record whose approver is the sovereign owner (neo). Deny-by-default. Identity of approver is OS-anchored in v0.1 (Linux user + Tailscale); crypto-key proof -> NOT_IN_V0_1.

action_ref.description: task_id or event_id the approval governs

protected_action.description: must match an id in governance/protected_actions.yaml

expires_at.description: after this, a PENDING approval becomes EXPIRED and the action stays blocked

approver.description: MUST equal 'neo' for an APPROVED protected action (kernel-enforced)

allOf.$comment: An APPROVED record must name an approver and a decision time.
